name: scrcpy
category: Display and control Android from a desktop
summary: > [!WARNING] > This GitHub repo ( ) is the only official source for the project. Do not download releases from random websites, even if their name contains scrcpy.

documentation.readme: > [!WARNING] > This GitHub repo ( ) is the only official source for the project. Do not download releases from random websites, even if their name contains scrcpy.
usage_sections: lightness: native, displays only the device screen
low startup time: 1 second to display the first image

arguments.name: --target
arguments.description: Target host, IP, MAC, or URL the tool operates on.

arguments.name: --output
arguments.description: Output file path for the report or capture.

arguments.name: --version
arguments.description: Print the tool version and exit.

arguments.name: --wordlist
arguments.description: Path to a wordlist (users, passwords, paths).

arguments.name: --dry-run
arguments.description: Print what would be done without making any changes.

arguments.name: --force
arguments.description: Force the action even if a safety check would block it.

arguments.name: --capture
arguments.description: Capture mode: write packets to a pcap file.

function_signatures.name: main
function_signatures.description: Top-level entry point for scrcpy (genymobile/scrcpy). Reads CLI args, dispatches to subcommands.

chain_examples.note: Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with zynon/LdapRelayScan (score=9); pair in the chain planner.
Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with zodiacon/HookHunter (score=9); pair in the chain planner.
Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with zmap/zmap (score=9); pair in the chain planner.
Phase 3: same attack_surface=['web'] and phase_hint='any'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.
Phase 4: same attack_surface=['web'] and phase_hint='any'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.

documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the Display and control Android from a desktop category. Fits when the engagement needs: > [!WARNING] > This GitHub repo ( ) is the only official source for the project. Do not download releases from random websites, even if their name contains scrcpy.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: > [!WARNING] > This GitHub repo ( ) is the only official source for the project. Do not download releases from random websites, even if their name contains scrcpy.
documentation.how_to_use: Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `scrcpy --video-codec=h265 --max-size=1920 --max-fps=60 --no-audio --keyboard=uhid`. Further invocations from upstream: `scrcpy --video-codec=h265 -m1920 --max-fps=60 --no-audio -K  # short version`; `scrcpy --new-display=1920x1080 --start-app=org.videolan.vlc`. > [!WARNING] > This GitHub repo ( ) is the only official source for the project. Do not download releases from random websites, even if their name contains scrcpy.

trust.warning: Attribution/index entry only. Audit provenance, code, releases, and licence before use. Operates against the operator's own authorized scope only.
